name: google-calendar
description: Full Google Calendar integration — list events, create, update, delete, and find free/busy times across multiple calendars
long_description:
Full Google Calendar integration for Chitty Workspace. Manage your schedule through natural language.

**Viewing** — List upcoming events with title, time, location, description, and attendees. Filter by number of days ahead. Query any calendar by ID.

**Creating** — Create new events with summary, times, location, description, and attendees. Supports setting event duration and inviting people.

**Updating** — Reschedule events, change titles, update descriptions, modify attendees. Only changed fields are sent.

**Deleting** — Cancel events with optional attendee notification. Feature-gated for safety.

**Free/Busy** — Find available time slots across one or more calendars. Perfect for scheduling meetings.

**Multi-Calendar** — All tools support a calendar_id parameter to work with shared calendars, team calendars, and resource calendars.

Authentication uses Google OAuth. Your credentials are stored securely in the OS keyring.

auth.instructions: This package uses Google OAuth to access your Google Calendar. You'll authorize Chitty Workspace to read, create, update, and delete events on your behalf.

setup_steps.label: Install Python dependencies
setup_steps.help_text: Python libraries needed for Google Calendar API and secure credential storage.

setup_steps.label: Connect to Google account
setup_steps.help_text: Click 'Connect' to authorize Chitty Workspace to access your Google Calendar. A browser window will open for Google OAuth authorization.

feature_flags.label: Allow creating events
feature_flags.description: When enabled, the agent can create new events on your Google Calendar.
feature_flags.enable_warning: The agent will be able to create events on your Google Calendar.

feature_flags.label: Allow updating events
feature_flags.description: When enabled, the agent can modify existing events (reschedule, change title, update description, etc.).
feature_flags.enable_warning: The agent will be able to modify existing events on your Google Calendar.

feature_flags.label: Allow deleting events
feature_flags.description: When enabled, the agent can delete/cancel events from your Google Calendar.
feature_flags.enable_warning: The agent will be able to permanently delete events from your Google Calendar. This action cannot be undone.

feature_flags.label: Allow inviting attendees
feature_flags.description: When enabled, the agent can add attendees to events. Attendees are only notified if notify_attendees is also set to true.
feature_flags.enable_warning: The agent will be able to invite people to calendar events, potentially sharing meeting details externally.

configurable_resources.label: Allowed Calendar IDs
configurable_resources.description: Calendar IDs the agent is allowed to access. Use 'primary' for your main calendar, or email addresses for shared/team calendars.

agent_config.default_instructions: You have access to Google Calendar tools. Show event details clearly with times, locations, and attendees. Always confirm event details with the user before creating, updating, or deleting events. Never modify or delete an event without explicit user confirmation. When scheduling, use the free/busy tool to find available time slots first.
suggested_prompts: Show me my schedule for this week
Create a meeting tomorrow at 2pm with the team
Schedule a 1-hour review meeting on Friday at 10am
What events do I have next week?
Find a free 30-minute slot this afternoon
capabilities: View event details (time, location, attendees, description)
Update existing events (reschedule, rename, change details)
Find free/busy time slots for scheduling
